label: Foundation
description: Get legally & operationally ready before seeing patients

steps.label: License Verified by NOVI Admin
steps.desc: Prerequisite for MD coverage. Upload your RN, NP, PA, or MD license for admin verification.

steps.label: Add MD to MPI
steps.desc: Legally required in most states. Add your supervising medical director to your practice profile.

steps.label: Upload CPR/BLS Cert
steps.desc: NOVI compliance requirement. Upload your current CPR or BLS certification.

steps.label: Bloodborne Pathogens Training
steps.desc: OSHA legal requirement. Complete annual bloodborne pathogens training.
steps.linkLabel: Take Red Cross bloodborne pathogens training →

steps.label: Form an LLC
steps.desc: Asset protection. Keeps your personal money separate from your business.

steps.label: Get EIN (Free)
steps.desc: Business banking requirement. Free 5-minute IRS form.
steps.linkLabel: Get your EIN from the IRS →

steps.label: Open Business Bank Account
steps.desc: Clean financials. Never mix personal and business money.

links.label: Open a free account with Mercury →
Open a free account with Relay →

steps.label: Malpractice Insurance
steps.desc: $30–50/mo, critical coverage. Non-negotiable before treating patients.

links.label: Get a quote from CM&F Group →
Get a quote from NEXT Insurance →

steps.label: Add MD to Insurance Policy
steps.desc: Required by most MDs. Contact your insurer to add your supervising MD to your malpractice policy.

label: Activation
description: Launch your NOVI profile and start accepting patients

steps.label: Complete Your Profile
steps.desc: 3x booking rate. Photo, bio, hours, and practice details — patients decide in 10 seconds.

steps.label: Add Services & Prices
steps.desc: Required to accept bookings. Toggle at least one service live with your pricing.

steps.label: Share Your Booking Link
steps.desc: Drop your NOVI link in your Instagram bio — Instagram → appointments.

steps.label: Cherry Patient Financing
steps.desc: 30–40% more high-ticket closes. Offer monthly payment plans at checkout.

steps.label: Apply to Supplier Marketplace
steps.desc: Better pricing and rep support from vetted aesthetic suppliers.

steps.label: Set Deposit & Cancellation Policy
steps.desc: Eliminate no-shows. A 20–30% deposit at booking kills last-minute cancellations.

steps.label: Is Stripe Connected
steps.desc: Required to collect patient deposits and card payments. Connect your Stripe account so NOVI can process bookings.

label: Growth
description: Build your brand and attract consistent new patients

steps.label: Start Posting on Instagram
steps.desc: Primary free patient acquisition channel. Post before/afters, tips, and your face 3x a week.

steps.label: Claim Google Business Profile
steps.desc: Free. Shows up when someone searches 'Botox near me' in your city.
steps.linkLabel: Claim your free Google Business Profile →

steps.label: Create Bundle/Loyalty Reward
steps.desc: Increases avg spend + retention. Add packages in your Treatments tab.
